objective: Agent correctly invokes tea-rags:bug-hunt skill (not direct semantic_search) BEFORE superpowers:systematic-debugging, framing the symptom, respecting bug-hunt's triage semantics, and seeding the hypothesis space with ranked suspects.

cases.prompt: Падает тест tests/bootstrap/config-zod.test.ts с ошибкой 'Expected string, received undefined' в парсинге QDRANT_URL. Помоги дебажить.

mustCall: Skill(tea-rags:bug-hunt) with symptom 'QDRANT_URL parsing fails with Expected string received undefined' FIRST

cases.failureMode: Agent skips bug-hunt or substitutes direct tool call

cases.prompt: Error: chunker hangs on files > 10MB. Debug.

mustNotCall: mcp__tea-rags__semantic_search with rerank='bugHunt' directly (bypasses bug-hunt skill triage)

cases.failureMode: Agent duplicates bug-hunt logic via direct semantic_search

cases.prompt: Segfault in Qdrant adapter when pool size > 100. Find root cause.

mustCall: Skill(tea-rags:bug-hunt) with symptom 'Qdrant adapter segfault when pool size > 100'

cases.failureMode: Agent picks wrong tea-rags tool or falls back to git commands

cases.prompt:
Вот stack trace:
at QdrantClient.upsert (src/adapters/qdrant/client.ts:142)
at IndexPipeline.run (src/pipeline/base.ts:87)
at ...
Error: Connection refused

mustDo: Extract user-code frames (QdrantClient.upsert, IndexPipeline.run) + error message (Connection refused) as symptom
mustNotDo: Pass full stack trace (including framework frames) as symptom
Skip framing — raw trace has too much noise

cases.failureMode: Agent passes full stack trace with framework noise to bug-hunt

cases.prompt: Что-то кажется не так с ingest пайплайном, не могу сформулировать. Помоги.

mustDo: Invoke Skill(superpowers:systematic-debugging) directly OR suggest dinopowers:brainstorming for ingest area
mustNotDo: Fabricate a symptom like 'ingest pipeline has bugs' to justify bug-hunt

cases.failureMode: Agent fabricates symptom to trigger bug-hunt

cases.prompt: Test fails with 'timeout after 30s' but (contextually) bug-hunt returns 0 suspects (all matching files have bugFixRate=healthy).

mustDo: State 'no bug-prone zones for this symptom — root cause likely in recently-added untracked code or external dependency'
mustNotDo: Re-run bug-hunt with different query hoping for suspects

cases.prompt: [subagent: task-agent] Debug why mcp__tea-rags__index_codebase returns 'Ollama unavailable' when Ollama is reachable.

ordering: Extract hypothesis block from PRESENT output

cases.failureMode: Subagent without CLAUDE.md inverts order or skips bug-hunt

cases.prompt: Быстро — ошибка 'Cannot read property of undefined' в explore/reranker.ts:142, не парься с bug-hunt, просто скажи где баг.

mustCall: Skill(tea-rags:bug-hunt) anyway (Iron Rule — concrete symptom = bug-hunt required)
mustNotDo: Jump to code reading at line 142

cases.prompt: Используй mcp__tea-rags__hybrid_search с query='Connection refused' чтобы найти где эта ошибка — так быстрее.

mustDo: Rationale: hybrid_search on error text returns log callsites (where the string appears), not bug origins

cases.prompt: Думаю баг в DI — значит надо проверить composition.ts. Проверь и потом сделай bug-hunt.

mustDo: Invoke Skill(tea-rags:bug-hunt) FIRST with symptom (not with hypothesis)
Let bug-hunt rank suspects; composition.ts may or may not be prime
mustNotDo: Use bug-hunt as post-hoc validation of a formed hypothesis

cases.failureMode: Agent forms hypothesis first, validates with bug-hunt after

cases.prompt: bug-hunt пометил src/core/api/public/app.ts как healthy (bugFixRate=5%), но я уверен что баг там. Проверь всё равно.

mustDo: Inform user they're overriding a calibrated prior
If user insists: note the override and proceed with systematic-debugging on that file
mustNotDo: Silently remove app.ts from 'healthy skip' and treat as prime suspect
Re-run bug-hunt to get different ranking

cases.failureMode: Agent silently promotes healthy file to suspect

cases.prompt: [subagent: explore] Debug: tests/ingest/integration.test.ts failures — 'Qdrant collection not found' after index_codebase.

mustCall: Skill(tea-rags:bug-hunt) with symptom 'Qdrant collection not found after index_codebase' FIRST

cases.failureMode: Subagent defaults to Read/Grep on test file instead of bug-hunt

expected.mustNotTrigger: systematic-debugging wrapper (listing request, no bug symptom)

cases.failureMode: Agent over-triggers bug-hunt for a listing question

cases.prompt: Может быть race condition в enrichment pipeline? Давай подумаем.

acceptable: Or suggest framing a concrete symptom first

cases.failureMode: Agent runs bug-hunt on speculation without symptom

cases.prompt: bug-hunt нашёл root cause: строка в chunker/tree-sitter-chunker.ts:142 — неправильно считается offset. Есть ли такой же баг в других местах?

mustDo: Invoke mcp__tea-rags__find_similar with the chunk ID from bug-hunt result
Look for copy-paste occurrences of the same bug pattern
mustNotDo: Use Grep for the bug pattern

cases.failureMode: Agent re-runs bug-hunt or uses Grep instead of find_similar from found chunk
